# Sui Playground — EVE Frontier Staging & Research Workspace (agent map)

> Formerly the March 2026 EVE Frontier hackathon planning workspace (now concluded).
> Now an EVE Frontier / Sui staging, research, and agent-context workspace. Historical
> hackathon docs are retained for reference, NOT as current plans or rules.

## Read first (agent rules + orientation)
- `.github/copilot-instructions.md` — authoritative agent guardrails (MUST READ)
- `AGENTS.md` — agent operating context (MUST READ)
- `docs/current/README.md` — current workspace guide + authority hierarchy
- `docs/current/eve-frontier-context-2026-06.md` — operator assumptions (June 2026; revalidate)
- `.github/security-guidelines.md` — security baseline

## Authority hierarchy (source of truth)
1. Current `vendor/world-contracts` Move code + official upstream docs (canonical)
2. Current workspace docs (`docs/current/`)
3. Validated experiments (`docs/validation/`, `sandbox/` — older contracts, revalidate)
4. Historical hackathon archive (`docs/archive/hackathon-2026/`)
5. Older plans / speculative docs

> Before writing new code, verify signatures/structs/events/auth against current
> `vendor/world-contracts`. Do not trust historical docs or LLM training data for on-chain shapes.

## Durable conventions
- `docs/core/hackathon-repo-conventions.md` — git/file/naming/TS/React/Move standards
- `.github/instructions/move.instructions.md` — Move conventions (auto-applied to *.move)
- `.github/instructions/typescript-react.instructions.md` — TS/React conventions (auto-applied to *.ts/*.tsx)
- `docs/ptb/` — PTB patterns (templates — revalidate every signature)

## Operations
- `docs/operations/submodule-refresh-prompt.md` — reusable submodule refresh + audit procedure
- `docs/current/operations/submodule-refresh-2026-06.md` — latest refresh + delta audit

## Vendor submodules (read-only upstream references)
- `vendor/world-contracts` — canonical on-chain Move code
- `vendor/builder-documentation` — official builder docs (GitBook source)
- `vendor/builder-scaffold` — Docker devnet, Move templates, TS/Rust scripts, zkLogin CLI
- `vendor/evevault` — EveVault wallet (Sui Wallet Standard + zkLogin)
- `vendor/eve-frontier-proximity-zk-poc` — ZK proximity PoC (Groth16, reference only)

## Index + history
- `docs/README.md` — full documentation index + classification legend
- `docs/archive/hackathon-2026/README.md` — historical hackathon archive index
- `docs/decision-log.md` — decisions, newest first

## Future task (not yet performed)
- `docs/current/future-research-briefs/weekend-project-ideation.md` — standing brief for a future
  weekend-build ideation pass (do not execute until the operator asks)
